name: as2_msgs
description: Messages, services and action files for the AS2 stack

Acro.description: Message for RPY rates and thrust (ACRO) [based on mav_msgs/msg/RateThrust.msg]
Acro.raw:
# Message for RPY rates and thrust (ACRO) [based on mav_msgs/msg/RateThrust.msg]

std_msgs/Header header               # Message header

geometry_msgs/Vector3 angular_rates  # Roll-, pitch-, yaw-rate around body axes [rad/s]
geometry_msgs/Vector3 thrust         # Thrust [N] expressed in the body frame.
                                     # For a fixed-wing, usually the x-component is used.
                                     # For a multi-rotor, usually the z-component is used.
                                     # Set all un-used components to 0.

fields.name: angular_rates
fields.comment: Roll-, pitch-, yaw-rate around body axes [rad/s]

fields.name: thrust
fields.comment: Thrust [N] expressed in the body frame.

AlertEvent.description: Message that encodes different alert Events that can be handled by AS2 framework
AlertEvent.raw:
# Message that encodes different alert Events that can be handled by AS2 framework

# if value is < 0 then this alert will be handled by the platform directly
int8 KILL_SWITCH = -1
int8 EMERGENCY_HOVER = -2
int8 EMERGENCY_LAND = -3

# 0 value is used for ping or info alerts 
int8 INFO_ALERT = 0

#if value is > 0 then this alert will be handled by the AS2 framework
int8 FORCE_HOVER = 1
int8 FORCE_LAND = 2

int8 alert
string description # Further description of the alert, for debugging purposes mainly

fields.name: description
fields.comment: Further description of the alert, for debugging purposes mainly

BehaviorStatus.raw:
uint8 IDLE    = 0
uint8 RUNNING = 1
uint8 PAUSED  = 2

uint8 status

ControlMode.description: Message that encodes the possible control modes supported in Aerostack2.
ControlMode.raw:
# Message that encodes the possible control modes supported in Aerostack2.

std_msgs/Header header          # Message header

int8 NONE       = 0
int8 YAW_ANGLE  = 1             # Yaw angle control mode (rad)
int8 YAW_SPEED  = 2             # Yaw speed control mode (rad/s)

int8 yaw_mode                   # Yaw mode

int8 UNSET                =  0  # mode when the controller is not set
int8 HOVER                =  1  # mode when the controller is in hover mode
int8 POSITION             =  2  # x,   y , z  refs
int8 SPEED                =  3  # vx, vy , vz refs
int8 SPEED_IN_A_PLANE     =  4  # vx, vy , z refs
int8 ATTITUDE             =  5  # roll, pitch, yaw  refs
int8 ACRO                 =  6  # roll, pitch, yawrate  refs
int8 TRAJECTORY           =  7  # x, y z, vx, vy, vz, ax, ay, az refs

int8 control_mode               # Control mode

int8 UNDEFINED_FRAME      =  0
int8 LOCAL_ENU_FRAME      =  1  # local coordinates (use this by default)
int8 BODY_FLU_FRAME       =  2  # body coordinates 
int8 GLOBAL_LAT_LONG_ASML =  3  # gnss wcoordinates 

int8 reference_frame            # Reference frame

fields.name: UNSET
fields.comment: mode when the controller is not set

fields.name: HOVER
fields.comment: mode when the controller is in hover mode

fields.name: TRAJECTORY
fields.comment: x, y z, vx, vy, vz, ax, ay, az refs

ControllerInfo.description: Message that shows the controller state and the current input_control_mode
ControllerInfo.raw:
# Message that shows the controller state and the current input_control_mode

std_msgs/Header header                      # Message header

as2_msgs/ControlMode input_control_mode     # Input control mode
as2_msgs/ControlMode output_control_mode    # Output control mode

FollowTargetInfo.description: Message that encodes the possible follow target info supported in Aerostack2.
FollowTargetInfo.raw:
# Message that encodes the possible follow target info supported in Aerostack2.

std_msgs/Header header          # Message header

int8 WAITING      = 0
int8 RUNNING      = 1
int8 END          = 2

int8 follow_status              # Follow status

int8 UNSET              =  0    # Mode when the follow mode is not set
int8 PICKUP             =  1 
int8 UNPICK             =  2
int8 DYNAMIC_LAND       =  3 
int8 DYNAMIC_FOLLOWER   =  4 

int8 follow_mode                # Follow mode

fields.name: UNSET
fields.comment: Mode when the follow mode is not set

Geozone.description: GeoStructure defined by an id, alert that generates in case of event and a polygon
Geozone.raw:
# GeoStructure defined by an id, alert that generates in case of event and a polygon 
# that defines the area.

int8 id                            # geofence id
int8 alert                         # alert generated
string type                        # geofence or geocage
string data_type                   # cartesian or gps
geometry_msgs/Polygon polygon      # fence polygon
float32 z_up                       # height limit up
float32 z_down                     # height limit bottom

GimbalControl.raw:
# Gimbal Control message definition

uint8 POSITION_MODE = 0
uint8 SPEED_MODE = 1

uint8 control_mode
geometry_msgs/Vector3Stamped target    # x: roll y: pitch z: yaw

fields.name: target
fields.comment: x: roll y: pitch z: yaw

MissionEvent.raw:
# Message for trigger mission events

std_msgs/Header header    # Message header

string data               # (Optional) data to send with the trigger

fields.name: data
fields.comment: (Optional) data to send with the trigger

MissionUpdate.description: Message that sends a mission to the interpreter
MissionUpdate.raw:
# Message that sends a mission to the interpreter

string drone_id     # ID of the drone that will execute the mission
int32 mission_id    # ID of the mission to be executed
int32 item_id       # ID of the item to be executed

uint8 EXECUTE   = 0   # Execute a mission in the interpreter
uint8 LOAD      = 1   # Load a mission to the interpreter
uint8 START     = 2   # Start the execution of a mission
uint8 PAUSE     = 3   # Pause the execution of a mission
uint8 RESUME    = 4   # Resume the execution of a mission
uint8 STOP      = 5   # Stop the execution of a mission
uint8 NEXT_ITEM = 6   # Execute the next item in the mission
uint8 REPEAT    = 7   # Repeat the execution of a mission
uint8 INSERT    = 8   # Insert an item in the mission
uint8 MODIFY    = 9   # Modify an item in the mission
uint8 REMOVE    = 10  # Remove an item in the mission
uint8 RESET     = 11  # Reset the interpreter

uint8 action        # Action to be performed in the interpreter

string mission      # JSON formatted mission to be executed

fields.name: drone_id
fields.comment: ID of the drone that will execute the mission

fields.name: mission_id
fields.comment: ID of the mission to be executed

fields.name: item_id
fields.comment: ID of the item to be executed

fields.name: EXECUTE
fields.comment: Execute a mission in the interpreter

fields.name: LOAD
fields.comment: Load a mission to the interpreter

fields.name: START
fields.comment: Start the execution of a mission

fields.name: PAUSE
fields.comment: Pause the execution of a mission

fields.name: RESUME
fields.comment: Resume the execution of a mission

fields.name: STOP
fields.comment: Stop the execution of a mission

fields.name: NEXT_ITEM
fields.comment: Execute the next item in the mission

fields.name: REPEAT
fields.comment: Repeat the execution of a mission

fields.name: INSERT
fields.comment: Insert an item in the mission

fields.name: MODIFY
fields.comment: Modify an item in the mission

fields.name: REMOVE
fields.comment: Remove an item in the mission

fields.name: action
fields.comment: Action to be performed in the interpreter

fields.name: mission
fields.comment: JSON formatted mission to be executed

NodeStatus.description: Message that shows the node status
NodeStatus.raw:
# Message that shows the node status

int8 UNCONFIGURED  = 0 
int8 INACTIVE      = 1 
int8 ACTIVE        = 2 
int8 FINALIZED     = 3 

int8 status                 # node status

PlatformInfo.description: Message that shows the platform status and the current control mode
PlatformInfo.raw:
# Message that shows the platform status and the current control mode

std_msgs/Header header                      # Message header

bool connected                              # Whether the platform is connected or not
bool armed                                  # Whether the platform is armed or not
bool offboard                               # Whether the offboard mode is set or not

as2_msgs/PlatformStatus status              # Platform status
as2_msgs/ControlMode current_control_mode   # Platform control mode

fields.name: connected
fields.comment: Whether the platform is connected or not

fields.name: armed
fields.comment: Whether the platform is armed or not

fields.name: offboard
fields.comment: Whether the offboard mode is set or not

PlatformStateMachineEvent.description: Platform events that actives aerial platform state machine
PlatformStateMachineEvent.raw:
# Platform events that actives aerial platform state machine 

int8 EMERGENCY     = -1 
int8 ARM           = 0 
int8 DISARM        = 1 
int8 TAKE_OFF      = 2 
int8 TOOK_OFF      = 3 
int8 LAND          = 4 
int8 LANDED        = 5 

int8 event                  # Platform state machine event

PlatformStatus.description: Platform states that an aerial platform can have
PlatformStatus.raw:
# Platform states that an aerial platform can have

int8 EMERGENCY     = -1 
int8 DISARMED      = 0 
int8 LANDED        = 1 
int8 TAKING_OFF    = 2 
int8 FLYING        = 3 
int8 LANDING       = 4 

int8 state                  # platform status

PolygonList.description: List of polygons to visualize multiple geozones in RVIZ2
PolygonList.raw:
# List of polygons to visualize multiple geozones in RVIZ2

geometry_msgs/PolygonStamped[] polygons

PoseStampedWithID.description: A Pose stamped with an string id
PoseStampedWithID.raw:
# A Pose stamped with an string id

string id                       # Identification string
geometry_msgs/PoseStamped pose  # Pose

PoseStampedWithIDArray.description: Pose Stamped with an string id array
PoseStampedWithIDArray.raw:
# Pose Stamped with an string id array

as2_msgs/PoseStampedWithID[] poses

PoseWithID.description: A Pose with an string id
PoseWithID.raw:
# A Pose with an string id

string id                       # Identification string
geometry_msgs/Pose pose         # Pose

PoseWithIDArray.description: Pose with an string id array
PoseWithIDArray.raw:
# Pose with an string id array

as2_msgs/PoseWithID[] poses

Speed.raw:
# Speed message

std_msgs/Header header      # Message header

float32 speed               # speed (m/s)

Thrust.description: Message for encoding the desired thrust value
Thrust.raw:
# Message for encoding the desired thrust value

std_msgs/Header header          # Message header

float32 thrust                  # Thrust (N)
float32 thrust_normalized       # Thrust normalized [0,1]

TrajGenInfo.description: Message that shows the trajectory generator state
TrajGenInfo.raw:
# Message that shows the trajectory generator state

std_msgs/Header header              # Message header

as2_msgs/NodeStatus node_status     # Node status

uint8 WAITING       = 0
uint8 EVALUATING    = 1
uint8 STOPPED       = 2

uint8 active_status                 # Active status

TrajectoryPoint.description: Definition of a point of a trajectory
TrajectoryPoint.raw:
# Definition of a point of a trajectory

geometry_msgs/Vector3 position      # Position of the vehicle in the frame_id frame
geometry_msgs/Vector3 twist         # Twist of the vehicle in the frame_id frame
geometry_msgs/Vector3 acceleration  # Acceleration of the vehicle in the frame_id frame

float32 yaw_angle                   # Yaw angle of the vehicle (rad) in the frame_id frame

fields.name: position
fields.comment: Position of the vehicle in the frame_id frame

fields.name: twist
fields.comment: Twist of the vehicle in the frame_id frame

fields.name: acceleration
fields.comment: Acceleration of the vehicle in the frame_id frame

fields.name: yaw_angle
fields.comment: Yaw angle of the vehicle (rad) in the frame_id frame

TrajectorySetpoints.description: Definition of a point of a trajectory
TrajectorySetpoints.raw:
# Definition of a point of a trajectory

std_msgs/Header header              # Message header with the frame_id of the point

as2_msgs/TrajectoryPoint[] setpoints # Array of setpoints of the vehicle in the frame_id frame

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Message header with the frame_id of the point

fields.name: setpoints
fields.comment: Array of setpoints of the vehicle in the frame_id frame

UInt16MultiArrayStamped.description: Please look at the std_msgs/MultiArrayLayout message definition for
UInt16MultiArrayStamped.raw:
# Please look at the std_msgs/MultiArrayLayout message definition for
# documentation on all multiarrays.
# This message is a multiarray of uint16 values with a timestamp, based on
# the std_msgs/MultiArrayLayout message.

builtin_interfaces/Time stamp     # Message timestamp
std_msgs/MultiArrayLayout layout  # Specification of data layout
uint16[] data                     # Array of data

YawMode.raw:
# Yaw goal

uint8 KEEP_YAW             = 0 # Keep the current yaw angle
uint8 PATH_FACING          = 1 # Yaw angle is aligned with the path
uint8 FIXED_YAW            = 2 # Yaw angle is fixed to a given angle
uint8 YAW_FROM_TOPIC       = 3 # Yaw angle is set by a topic
uint8 YAW_FROM_ORIENTATION = 4 # Yaw angle is set by pose orientation
uint8 YAW_TO_FRAME         = 5 # Yaw angle is set to face the used frame
uint8 FACE_REFERENCE       = 6 # Yaw angle is set to face the next reference

uint8 mode      # Yaw mode
float32 angle   # Fixed yaw (rad)

fields.name: PATH_FACING
fields.comment: Yaw angle is aligned with the path

fields.name: FIXED_YAW
fields.comment: Yaw angle is fixed to a given angle

fields.name: YAW_FROM_TOPIC
fields.comment: Yaw angle is set by a topic

fields.name: YAW_FROM_ORIENTATION
fields.comment: Yaw angle is set by pose orientation

fields.name: YAW_TO_FRAME
fields.comment: Yaw angle is set to face the used frame

fields.name: FACE_REFERENCE
fields.comment: Yaw angle is set to face the next reference

AddStaticTransform.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: AddStaticTransform
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service receives a transform to add it to the tf tree as static transform

string frame_id                      # Parent frame frame id
string child_frame_id                # Child frame id
geometry_msgs/Transform transform  # Transform
---
bool success                        # whether the transform has been set or not
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether the transform has been set or not

AddStaticTransformGps.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: AddStaticTransform
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service receives a transform to add it to the tf tree as static transform

string frame_id                      # Parent frame frame id
string child_frame_id                # Child frame id
sensor_msgs/NavSatFix gps_position    # Transform
float32 azimuth                        # yaw
float32 elevation                      # pitch
float32 bank                           # roll
---
bool success                        # whether the transform has been set or not
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether the transform has been set or not

DynamicFollower.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: DynamicFollower
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service send command to start dynamic follower

bool enable                         # Flag to enable follower
geometry_msgs/Twist speed_limit     # Speed limit (m/s)
---
bool success                        # whether it could be started or not
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether it could be started or not

DynamicLand.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: DynamicLand
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service send command to start dynamic land

bool enable                         # Flag to enable land
geometry_msgs/Twist speed_limit     # speed limit (m/s)
---
bool success                        # whether it could be started or not
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether it could be started or not

GeopathToPath.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: PathToGeopath
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service receives a path in LatLon and returns it transformed into local

geographic_msgs/GeoPath geo_path    # Path in lat/lon and altitude
---
bool success                        # whether the origin has been set or not
nav_msgs/Path path                  # Path in meters 
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether the origin has been set or not

response_fields.name: path
response_fields.comment: Path in meters

GetGeozone.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: GetGeoStructure
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service return a geostructure list (lat, lon, alt) stored in the geozones node

---
bool success                    # whether the geofence has been set or not
as2_msgs/Geozone[] geozone_list   # geofences stored in memory
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether the geofence has been set or not

response_fields.name: geozone_list
response_fields.comment: geofences stored in memory

GetOrigin.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: GetOrigin
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service return a origin (lat, lon, alt) if it was previously set

---
bool success                        # whether the origin has been set or not
geographic_msgs/GeoPoint origin     # origin 
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether the origin has been set or not

response_fields.name: origin
response_fields.comment: origin

ListControlModes.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: ListControlModes
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service ask for available control modes list

---
string source                   # Control modes source
uint8[] control_modes           # Control modes list
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: source
response_fields.comment: Control modes source

response_fields.name: control_modes
response_fields.comment: Control modes list

ModifySwarm.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: NumSwarmFormation
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service modifies the number of drones in the swarm
bool detach_drone                               # Detach the drone reference from the swarm
bool new_drone                                  # Add new drone reference to the swarm
bool new_virtual_centroid_ref                   # New reference to follow
geometry_msgs/PoseStamped  virtual_centroid     # Offset of the virtual centroid to the following frame
as2_msgs/PoseWithID[] swarm_formation           # Topics to modify the flocking
---
bool success                                    # whether the SwarmBehavior has been set or not

request_fields.name: detach_drone
request_fields.comment: Detach the drone reference from the swarm

request_fields.name: new_drone
request_fields.comment: Add new drone reference to the swarm

request_fields.name: virtual_centroid
request_fields.comment: Offset of the virtual centroid to the following frame

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether the SwarmBehavior has been set or not

PackagePickUp.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: PackagePickUp
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service send command to start package pickup

bool enable                             # Flag to enable pickup
geometry_msgs/Twist speed_limit         # speed limit (m/s)
---
bool success                            # whether it could be started or not
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether it could be started or not

PackageUnPick.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: PackageUnPick
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service send command to start package unpick

bool enable                             # Flag to enable unpick
geometry_msgs/Twist speed_limit         # speed limit (m/s)
---
bool success                            # whether it could be started or not
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether it could be started or not

PathToGeopath.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: PathToGeopath
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service receives a path in LatLon and returns it transformed into local

nav_msgs/Path path                  # Path (m)
---
bool success                        # whether the origin has been set or not
geographic_msgs/GeoPath geo_path    # Path in lat/lon and altitude
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether the origin has been set or not

response_fields.name: geo_path
response_fields.comment: Path in lat/lon and altitude

SetControlMode.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: SetPlatformControlMode
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service sets a platform control mode

as2_msgs/ControlMode control_mode       # Control mode to set
---
bool success                        # whether the control mode has been set or not
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether the control mode has been set or not

SetGeozone.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: SetGeostructure
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service creates a geoStructure (lat, lon, alt) to set in geozones node

as2_msgs/Geozone geozone  # geostructure to set
---
bool success                # whether the geoStructure has been set or not
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether the geoStructure has been set or not

SetOrigin.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: SetOrigin
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service sends a origin (lat, lon, alt) to set

geographic_msgs/GeoPoint origin     # origin to set
---
bool success                        # whether the origin has been set or not
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether the origin has been set or not

SetPlatformStateMachineEvent.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: SetPlatformStateMachineEvent
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service sets a PlatformStateMachineEvent

as2_msgs/PlatformStateMachineEvent event     # event to set
---
bool success                                # whether the PSM has been set or not
as2_msgs/PlatformStatus current_state       # PSM result of the aircraft
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether the PSM has been set or not

response_fields.name: current_state
response_fields.comment: PSM result of the aircraft

SetSpeed.raw:
# SERVICE TYPE: SetSpeed
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This service sends a speed to set

as2_msgs/Speed speed        # speed to send
---
bool success                # whether the speed has been received or not
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: whether the speed has been received or not

DetectArucoMarkers.raw:
# List of ArUco IDs

# Request
uint16[] target_ids

---
# Response
bool success

---
# Feedback
bool sucess

FollowPath.raw:
# Follow path action definition

# Request
std_msgs/Header header                   # Message header, with the frame of the pose list
as2_msgs/YawMode yaw                     # Yaw goal mode
as2_msgs/PoseWithID[] path               # List of poses with ID in path
float32 max_speed                        # Maximum speed desired in path (m/s)

---
# Result
bool follow_path_success                 # False if failed to follow_path

---
# Feedback
float32 actual_speed                     # Actual speed (m/s)
float32 actual_distance_to_next_waypoint # Distance to next waypoint (m)
uint16 remaining_waypoints               # Remaining_waypoints
string next_waypoint_id                  # Next waypoint id in path to follow

goal_fields.name: header
goal_fields.comment: Message header, with the frame of the pose list

goal_fields.name: path
goal_fields.comment: List of poses with ID in path

feedback_fields.name: next_waypoint_id
feedback_fields.comment: Next waypoint id in path to follow

FollowReference.raw:
# Follow reference action definition

# Request

as2_msgs/YawMode yaw                    # Yaw mode
geometry_msgs/PointStamped target_pose  # Goal pose 3D (m)
float32 max_speed_x                     # Maximum speed in x (m/s)
float32 max_speed_y                     # Maximum speed in x (m/s)
float32 max_speed_z                     # Maximum speed in x (m/s)
---
# Result
bool follow_reference_success           # False if failed to takeoff
---
# Feedback
float32 actual_speed                    # Actual speed (m/s)
float32 actual_distance_to_goal         # Distance to goal (m)

GeneratePolynomialTrajectory.raw:
# Trajectory_generator action definition

# Request
builtin_interfaces/Time stamp      # Request timestamp
as2_msgs/YawMode yaw               # Yaw goal mode
as2_msgs/PoseStampedWithID[] path  # List of poses with ID in path, with each frame id and time stamp
float32 max_speed                  # Maximum speed desired in path (m/s)

---
# Result
bool trajectory_generator_success  # False if failed to follow the generated trajectory

---
# Feedback
string next_waypoint_id            # Next waypoint id in path to follow
uint16 remaining_waypoints         # Number of remaining waypoints to follow

goal_fields.name: path
goal_fields.comment: List of poses with ID in path, with each frame id and time stamp

result_fields.name: trajectory_generator_success
result_fields.comment: False if failed to follow the generated trajectory

feedback_fields.name: next_waypoint_id
feedback_fields.comment: Next waypoint id in path to follow

feedback_fields.name: remaining_waypoints
feedback_fields.comment: Number of remaining waypoints to follow

GoToWaypoint.raw:
# Go to waypoint action definition

# Request

as2_msgs/YawMode yaw                    # Yaw mode
geometry_msgs/PointStamped target_pose  # Goal pose 3D (m)
float32 max_speed                       # Maximum speed (m/s)
---
# Result
bool go_to_success                       # False if failed to takeoff
---
# Feedback
float32 actual_speed                    # Actual speed (m/s)
float32 actual_distance_to_goal         # Distance to goal (m)

Land.raw:
# Land action definition

# Request
float32 land_speed              # land speed (m/s) 
---
# Result
bool land_success               # false if failed to land
---
# Feedback
float32 actual_land_speed       # actual speed (m/s)
float32 actual_land_height      # actual height (m)

NavigateToPoint.raw:
# Navigate to Point

# Request
geometry_msgs/PointStamped point                        # Goal pose 3D (m)
as2_msgs/YawMode yaw                                    # Yaw goal mode
float32 navigation_speed                                # Maximum speed desired in path (m/s)
---
# Result
bool success                                            # Point reached?
---
# Feedback
geometry_msgs/PoseStamped current_pose                  # Current pose (m)
geometry_msgs/TwistStamped current_speed                # Current speed (m/s)
builtin_interfaces/Duration navigation_time             # Time from departure (s)
builtin_interfaces/Duration estimated_time_remaining    # Time to goal (s)
float32 distance_remaining                              # Distance to goal (m)

PointGimbal.raw:
# Point Gimbal action definition

# Request
as2_msgs/GimbalControl control           # Goal target
bool follow_mode                               # Keep following after reach target
---
# Result
bool success                                   # False if failed to point to target
---
# Feedback
geometry_msgs/Vector3Stamped gimbal_attitude   # Current attitude (rad)
geometry_msgs/Vector3Stamped gimbal_speed      # Current speed (rad/s)

result_fields.name: success
result_fields.comment: False if failed to point to target

SwarmFlocking.raw:
# Swarm action definition

# Request
geometry_msgs/PoseStamped   virtual_centroid    # Offset of the virtual centroid to the following frame
as2_msgs/PoseWithID[] swarm_formation           # Pose of the drones with respect to the virtual centroid
string[]    drones_namespace                    # Namespaces of the drones in the swarm
---
# Result
bool swarm_success                              # False if failed to swarm_success
---
# Feedback
geometry_msgs/Pose swarm_pose                   # Current swarm pose

goal_fields.name: virtual_centroid
goal_fields.comment: Offset of the virtual centroid to the following frame

goal_fields.name: swarm_formation
goal_fields.comment: Pose of the drones with respect to the virtual centroid

goal_fields.name: drones_namespace
goal_fields.comment: Namespaces of the drones in the swarm

Takeoff.raw:
# Takeoff action definition

# Request
float32 takeoff_height              # Takeoff height (m)
float32 takeoff_speed               # Takeoff speed (m/s) 
---
# Result
bool takeoff_success                # false if failed to takeoff
---
